summary: The legal source domain contains only the one hundred integer orders from 1 through 100, and the proven six-order game-state cycle reduces every case to one remainder comparison.

workload_bound.source_constraint: The only input is an integer n satisfying 1 <= n <= 100.

replacement_checks.evidence: The game-state sequence repeats every six orders, so evaluation performs one modulo-six operation and one comparison without constructing any tree nodes.
Authored cases cover all outcome-relevant residues, the first and repeated losing orders, the minimum order, later large orders, and the maximum legal order.
